transcript.text:
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat something simple for the weekend
It's my local Kimbap Heaven
I got rejected to filmed at 3 places already
This is my last resort
This place feels like home
Let's head inside
[Kimbap Heaven] It's a very traditional looking place
There are so many items on the menu
Spicy Rice Cake, Ramyun Noodles,
The Cheese Pork Cutlet & the Sweet Potato Cutlet are a must
The special combo is nice too
Let's get the special combo
We have to order some kimbap (Seaweed Rolls) since we are at Kimbap Heave
And also can't forget about the Ramyun Noodles
What is Rajebi? Ramyun+Sujebi? (Hand-torn Dough Soup)

[And what else?]
[I'm going nuts]
I can't memorize all of that
Excuse me, do you have a pen and paper?
Sweet Potato Pork Cutlet
Tuna Roll
Jjolmeyon (Cold Spicy Chewy Noodles)
Spicy Rice Cake with Noodles
Ramyun Noodles with Rice Cake
Let's get the Rajebi instead of the Ramyun Noodles with Rice Cake
I need some kind of a stew
Tuna Kimchi Stew?
Excuse me,
I'll take these,
Alone? You're all of that by yourself?
Yes

Bon appetit!
[Coming out 1 by 1]
That's a lot!
Thank you
May I please get an extra plate?
[Spicy Rice Cake with Noodles]
[Tuna Kimchi Stew]
[Rajebi (Ramyun+Sujebi)]
[Sweet Potato Cheese Pork Cutlet]
[Tuna Kimbap]
[Jjolmyeon (Cold Spicy Chewy Noodles with assorted vegetables)]
Look at the steam
It's not the sujebi from the factories
Some kimchi
Wrap it
These noodles have a distinct taste at places like this

You can never make this from home
I don't know how they do it
I wonder how
So good
With tuna kimbap
These rolls are big
Slightly dip
Spicy Rice Cake with Noodles
These noodles taste good
So good
Dip
Let's eat the noodles before they get bloated
My sleeves?
[I got you Rice Thief!]
[Isolation]
Let's mix the jjolmyeon up

Can't eat this by itself
[Cut the Sweet Potato Cheese Pork Cutlet]
Do you guys see the inside?
Check it out
Amazing
Truly amazing
It just melted in my mouth It's so good
Everything is so tasty
Really
This is insanely good
It just melts
[1 bite of the pork cutlet, 1 bite of the chewy noodles]
It will be legendary if the stew is yummy too
It already looks good
[All-pass]
Now for the egg

Incredible
The pork cutlet is the best
This is #1
This and the chewy noodles It's crazy
[A Perfect Combination]
Kimbap goes really well with the spicy rice cake
Dip it
[Some stew to reset]
[Spoonful of white rice]
[Finish with the soup]
[A perfect Kimbap Heaven routine]
I want to save it
[Tuna Kimbap airplane]
[Arrival at the sauce]
[Crash]
It exploded

Yum
Just tastes like a tuna stew
There's a lot of tuna in there
There are some rice cake in here
I love it
This mukbang is going to end so quickly
[The food disappeared]
[That's strange..]
I don't really eat the boiled eggs inside these cold noodles
It's good
This is really..
[Finishing up the Cold Noodles]
[Cleared the Spicy Rice Cake]
Really good
Should I order 2 more pork cutlets but without the rice and the salad?
[This isn't enough food]

I don't know how to explain this taste
Their own unique Ramyun Noodles flavor
I really don't know how they do it
Last piece
So good
Tasty
Let's get some white rice in the ramyun soup
Toss that in
This is what's up
It's a bibimbap (Rice with Mixed Vegetables
[New menu: Ramyun Bibimbap]
Excellent
Let's get some kimchi
Very nice
[Finishing up the rest]
Empty, empty, empty, empty

1 more left
I'm not eating that much today
Because I drank too much last night
I will end the mukbang here
Thanks everyone~
It's cold
Ta-da
It's warm
It's cold
Let's go
[Yes, she's sober]
People will think I'm a crazy person
This is it
I'm going to catch a chicken
That seems impossible
I'm pissed

I'm going to break the trash bin
